features.name: Rage
features.description:
Start/end as bonus action; bonus damage to melee weapon attacks using Str; lasts 1 min
Adv. on Strength checks/saves (not attacks); resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing
Stops if I end turn without attacking or taking damage since last turn, or unconscious

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: Without armor, my AC is 10 + Dexterity modifier + Constitution modifier + shield

features.name: Danger Sense
features.description: Adv. on Dexterity saves against seen effects (not blinded/deafened/incapacitated)

features.name: Reckless Attack
features.description: Adv. on Str melee weapon attacks in my turn, but attacks vs. me adv. until next turn

features.name: Primal Path
features.description: Choose a Primal Path that shapes the nature of your rage and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Fast Movement
features.description: I gain +10 ft speed when I'm not wearing heavy armor

features.name: Feral Instinct
features.description: I get adv. on Initiative; I can enter rage to act normally on the first turn when surprised

features.name: Brutal Critical
features.description: I can roll additional dice for the extra damage on a critical hit with a melee attack

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.description:
[DC 10 + 5 per try, per short rest]If I drop to 0 HP while raging, I can make a DC 10 Constitution save to stay at 1 HP
The DC increases by 5 for every attempt until I finish a short or long rest

features.name: Persistent Rage
features.description: My rage only lasts less than 1 minute if I fall unconscious or I choose to end it

features.name: Indomitable Might
features.description: If a Strength check is lower than my Strength score, I can use my Strength score instead

features.name: Primal Champion
features.description: I add +4 to both my Strength and Constitution, and their maximums increase to 24

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description:
As a bonus action, I give a creature in 60 ft that can hear me an inspiration die (max 1)
For 10 min, the recipient can add it to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw
This addition can be done after seeing the d20 roll, but before knowing the outcome

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast bard cantrips/spells that I know, using Charisma as my spellcasting ability
I can use a musical instrument as a spellcasting focus for my bard spells
I can cast my known bard spells as rituals if they have the ritual tag

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.description: I can add half my Proficiency Bonus to any ability check that doesn't already include it

features.name: Song of Rest
features.description: Those that use HD and can hear my performance during a short rest get extra healing

features.name: Bard College
features.description: Choose a College that reflects your personality and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Expertise
features.description: I gain expertise with two skills I am proficient with; two more at 10th level

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.description: I can now also recover my expended Bardic Inspiration uses after a short rest

features.name: Countercharm
features.description:
As an action, I can do a performance that lasts until the end of my next turn
While it lasts, any friend in earshot & 30 ft has adv. on saves vs. frightened/charmed

features.name: Magical Secrets
features.description: I can add two spells/cantrips from any class to my spells known; +2 at level 14 & 18

features.name: Superior Inspiration
features.description: I regain one use of Bardic Inspiration if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Divine Domain
features.description: Choose a Domain related to your deity and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast prepared cleric cantrips/spells, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability
I can use a holy symbol as a spellcasting focus for my cleric spells
I can cast my prepared cleric spells as rituals if they have the ritual tag

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: I can channel divine energy to cause an effect; the save for this is my cleric spell DC

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
features.description:
As an action, all undead within 30 ft that can see/hear me must make a Wisdom save
If an undead fails this save, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes any damage
Turned: move away, never within 30 ft of me, no reactions or actions other than Dash
Turned: may Dodge instead of Dash when nowhere to move and unable to escape bonds

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.description: An undead up to the CR above that fails its save when I use Turn Undead is destroyed

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description:
As an action, I can implore my deity for help; the DM determines the form of help
Without intervention, I can retry after a long rest; otherwise, I have to wait a week

features.name: Druidic
features.description: I know Druidic; Hidden messages with it are only understood by those who know Druidic

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast prepared druid cantrips/spells, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability
I can use a druidic focus as a spellcasting focus for my druid spells
I can cast my prepared druid spells as rituals if they have the ritual tag

features.name: Druid Circle
features.description: Choose a Circle you can identify with and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description:
As an action, I assume the shape of a beast I have seen before with the following rules:
 • I gain all its game statistics except Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma
 • I get its skill/saving throw prof. while keeping my own, using whichever is higher
 • I assume the beast's HP and HD; I get mine back when I revert back
 • I can't cast spells in beast form, but transforming doesn't break concentration
 • I retain features from class, race, etc., but I don't retain special senses
 • I can choose whether equipment falls to the ground, merges, or stays worn
 • I revert if out of time or unconscious; if KOd by damage, excess damage carries over

features.name: Beast Spells
features.description: I can perform the somatic and verbal components of druid spells while in a beast shape

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: I age more slowly, only 1 year for every 10 years that pass

features.name: Archdruid
features.description:
I can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times
My druid spells don't require verbal, somatic, or free material components

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a Fighting Style for the fighter using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: As a bonus action, I regain 1d10 + fighter level HP; I can use this once per short rest

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: I can take one additional action on my turn on top of my normally allowed actions

features.name: Martial Archetype
features.description: Choose a Martial Archetype you strive to emulate and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: I can reroll a failed saving throw, but must keep the new result

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description:
Monk weapons: any simple melee (not two-handed/heavy), unarmed strike, shortsword
With monk weapons, I can use Dex instead of Str and use the Martial Arts damage die
When taking an Attack action with these, I get one unarmed strike as a bonus action

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: Without armor and no shield, my AC is 10 + Dexterity modifier + Wisdom modifier

features.name: Ki
features.description:
I can spend ki points to fuel special actions (see third page)
I need to meditate for at least 30 min of a short rest for that short rest to restore ki

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: Speed increases and eventually lets me traverse some surfaces without falling as I move

features.name: Deflect Missiles
features.description:
As a reaction, I can reduce ranged weapon attack damage done to me
If the damage is negated, I catch and may throw it back (20/60 ft) as a monk weapon

features.name: Monastic Tradition
features.description: Choose a Monastic Tradition to commit to and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Slow Fall
features.description: As a reaction, I can reduce any falling damage I take by five times my monk level

features.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
features.description: My unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistances and immunities

features.name: Evasion
features.description: My Dexterity saves vs. areas of effect negate damage on success and halve it on failure

features.name: Stillness of Mind
features.description: As an action, I can end one effect on me that causes me to be charmed or frightened

features.name: Purity of Body
features.description: My mastery of the ki flowing through me makes me immune to poison and disease

features.key: tongue of the sun and moon
features.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
features.description: I can understand all spoken languages and all creatures with a language understand me

features.name: Diamond Soul
features.description: I am proficient with all saves; I can reroll a failed save once by spending 1 ki point

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: I don't require food or water; I don't suffer age penalties and can't be aged magically

features.name: Empty Body
features.description: Be invisible and resist non-force damage for 1 min or cast Astral Projection on self

features.name: Perfect Self
features.description: I regain 4 ki points if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description:
As an action, I sense celestials/fiends/undead/consecrated/desecrated within 60 ft
Until the end of my next turn, I sense the type/location if it is not behind total cover

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.description:
As an action, I can use points in my pool to heal a touched, living creature's hit points
I can neutralize poisons/diseases instead at a cost of 5 points per affliction

features.name: Divine Smite
features.description:
When I hit a melee weapon attack, I can expend a spell slot to do +2d8 radiant damage
This increases by +1d8 for each spell slot level above 1st and +1d8 against undead/fiends

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a Fighting Style for the paladin using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast prepared paladin spells, using Charisma as my spellcasting ability
I can use a holy symbol as a spellcasting focus for my paladin spells

features.name: Divine Health
features.description: I am immune to disease, thanks to the power of my faith

features.name: Sacred Oath
features.description: Choose a Sacred Oath you swear to and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: While I'm conscious, allies within range and I can add my Cha mod (min 1) to saves

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.description: While I'm conscious, allies within range and I can't be frightened

features.name: Improved Divine Smite
features.description: Whenever I hit a creature with a melee weapon, I do an extra 1d8 radiant damage

features.name: Cleansing Touch
features.description: As an action, I can end one spell on me or another willing creature by touch

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description:
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add a favored enemy to the third page
When selecting a favored enemy, I also learn one of the languages it speaks
I have adv. on Wis (Survival) checks to track and Int checks to recall info about them

features.name: Natural Explorer
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add a favored terrain to the third page

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a Fighting Style for the ranger using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast ranger spells that I know, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability

features.name: Primeval Awareness
features.description:
As an action, I can use a spell slot to focus my awareness for 1 min per spell slot level
Out to 1 mile (6 in favored terrain), I sense if certain types of creatures are present

features.name: Ranger Archetype
features.description: Choose a Ranger Archetype you strive to emulate and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Land's Stride
features.description:
I can travel through nonmagical, difficult terrain without penalty
I have advantage on saves vs. plants that impede movement by magical influence

features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
features.description:
I can hide with +10 to Dex (Stealth) after spending 1 minute creating camouflage
Once I move or take an action or a reaction, the benefit is lost

features.name: Vanish
features.description: I can't be nonmagically tracked if I don't want to be and can Hide as a bonus action

features.name: Feral Senses
features.description:
When not blinded or deafened, I'm aware of invisible, non-hidden creatures in 30 ft
I don't have disadvantage when attacking creatures I am aware of but can't see

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.description: Once per turn, I can add my Wis mod to the attack or damage roll vs. a favored enemy

features.name: Expertise
features.description: I gain expertise with two skills/thieves' tools I am proficient with; two more at 6th level

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description:
Once per turn, I can add damage to a finesse/ranged weapon attack if I have advantage
I don't need adv. if the target has a conscious enemy within 5 ft and I don't have disadv.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: I know the secret rogue language that I can use to convey messages inconspicuously

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: I can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action

features.name: Roguish Archetype
features.description: Choose a Roguish Archetype you strive to emulate and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: As a reaction, I can halve the damage of an attack from an attacker that I can see

features.name: Evasion
features.description: My Dexterity saves vs. areas of effect negate damage on success and halve it on failure

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.description: If I make an ability check where I add my Proficiency Bonus, rolls of 9 or lower are 10

features.name: Blindsense
features.description: With my hearing, I can locate hidden or invisible creatures that are within 10 ft of me

features.name: Slippery Mind
features.description: I am proficient with Wisdom saving throws

features.name: Elusive
features.description: Attackers do not gain advantage on attacks vs. me, unless I am incapacitated

features.name: Stroke of Luck
features.description: I can turn a missed attack into a hit or a failed ability check into a natural 20

features.name: Sorcerous Origin
features.description: Choose the Sorcerous Origin for your innate powers and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast sorcerer cantrips/spells that I know, using Charisma as my spellcasting ability
I can use an arcane focus as a spellcasting focus for my sorcerer spells

features.name: Font of Magic
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can use sorcery points to create spell slots and vice versa
I can convert spell slots to sorcery points at a rate of 1 point per spell slot level
I can convert sorcery points to spell slots, which last until I finish a long rest, as follows:
Level 1 for 2 sorcery points;   level 2 for 3 sorcery points;   level 3 for 5 sorcery points
Level 4 for 6 sorcery points;   level 5 for 7 sorcery points

features.name: Metamagic
features.description:
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add a Metamagic option to the third page
I can use only 1 Metamagic option on a spell unless otherwise written

features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
features.description: I regain 4 expended sorcery points whenever I finish a short rest

features.name: Otherworldly Patron
features.description: Choose the Otherworldly Patron you have a bargain with and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description:
I can cast warlock cantrips/spells that I know, using Charisma as my spellcasting ability
I can use an arcane focus as a spellcasting focus for my warlock spells
I regain these spell slots on a short rest

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description:
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add Eldritch Invocations to the third page
Whenever I gain a warlock level, I can replace an invocation I know with another

features.name: Pact Boon
features.description: Choose a Pact Boon (Blade, Chain, or Tome) using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Mystic Arcanum
features.description:
I can choose one spell from the warlock spell list of each level mentioned above
I can cast these spells each once per long rest without needing to use a spell slot

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.description: I can regain all used pact magic spells slots by spending 1 minute entreating my patron

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day after a short rest, I can recover a number of 5th-level or lower spell slots

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast prepared wizard cantrips/spells, using Intelligence as my spellcasting ability
I can use an arcane focus as a spellcasting focus for my wizard spells
I can cast all wizard spells in my spellbook as rituals if they have the ritual tag

features.name: Arcane Tradition
features.description: Choose the Arcane Tradition you studied and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Spell Mastery
features.description:
By spending 8 hours in study, I can pick a 1st and 2nd-level spell in my spellbook
While prepared, I can cast them at their lowest levels without expending spell slots

features.name: Signature Spell
features.description:
Two 3rd-level spells of my choice in my spellbook will always count as prepared
I can cast both at third level once per short rest without expending spell slots

features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: I score a critical hit with my weapon attacks on a roll of 19 and 20

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.description:
I add half my Proficiency Bonus to Str/Dex/Con checks if I would otherwise add none
When making running long jumps, I add my Strength modifier to the distance in feet

features.name: Additional Fighting Style
features.description: Choose an Additional Fighting Style using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Superior Critical
features.description: I score a critical hit with my weapon attacks on a roll of 18, 19, and 20

features.name: Survivor
features.description: At the start of my turn, if I'm not above half or at 0 HP, I regain 5 + Con mod HP

features.name: Bonus Cantrip
features.description: I know one additional druid cantrip of my choice

features.name: Natural Recovery
features.description: After a short rest, I can recover a number of 5th-level or lower spell slots

features.name: Circle Spells
features.description: Choose a terrain that grants you spells using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Land's Stride
features.description:
I can travel through nonmagical, difficult terrain without penalty
I have advantage on saves vs. plants that impede movement by magical influence

features.name: Nature's Ward
features.description: I am immune to poison/disease and I can't be charmed/frightened by elementals or fey

features.name: Nature's Sanctuary
features.description:
When a beast or plant attacks me, it must make a Wis save or pick a different target
If it can't, it automatically misses; On a successful save, it is immune for 24 hours

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I gain proficiency with three skills of my choice

features.name: Cutting Words
features.description:
As a reaction, when a foe within earshot & 60 ft rolls ability check, attack or damage,
I can subtract a Bardic Inspiration die from the result unless the foe can't be charmed

features.name: Additional Magical Secrets
features.description: I can add two spells/cantrips from any class to my Spells Known

features.name: Peerless Skill
features.description: When making an ability check, I can expend a use of Bardic Inspiration to add the die

features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.description:
When I am not wearing armor, my AC is 13 + Dexterity modifier
My hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to my sorcerer level

features.name: Dragon Ancestor
features.description:
Choose a Dragon Ancestor using the "Choose Feature" button above
When interacting with dragons, if I can add my Proficiency Bonus, I can double it

features.name: Elemental Affinity
features.description:
Choose a Dragon Ancestor using the "Choose Feature" button above
I add Cha mod for spell damage if matching my dragon ancestor's affiliated type
I can spend 1 sorcery point to gain resistance to my dragon ancestor's affiliated type

features.name: Dragon Wings
features.description:
As a bonus action, unless armor is in the way, I can sprout dragon wings from my back
I gain a fly speed equal to my current speed until I dismiss the wings as a bonus action

features.name: Draconic Presence
features.description:
As an action, I create 60-ft radius aura of awe/fear for concentration up to 1 minute
All hostiles in this aura must make a Wis save or be charmed (awe) or frightened (fear)
They make their saves at the beginning of their turns
A creature that succeeds on the save is immune to my aura for 24 hours

features.name: Hunter's Prey
features.description: Choose Colossus Slayer, Giant Killer, or Horde Breaker with the "Choose Feature" button

features.name: Defensive Tactics
features.description: "Choose Feature" button to choose Escape the Horde, Multiattack Defense, or Steel Will

features.name: Multiattack
features.description: Choose Volley or Whirlwind Attack using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
features.description: "Choose Feature" button to choose Evasion, Stand Against the Tide, or Uncanny Dodge

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with heavy armor

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.description:
Whenever a 1st-level or higher spell I cast restores HP to a creature, it heals more
The creature regains an additional 2 + spell level (SL) worth of hit points
Note that "X/SL" on the spell page means per spell slot level above the spell's normal level

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.description:
As an action, I can heal any creature within 30 ft of me up to half their maximum HP
I divide the number of hit points among the creatures as I see fit

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.description: When I restore HP to another with a spell, I regain 2 + the spell (slot) level in HP

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Supreme Healing
features.description: When I restore HP with a spell, I heal the maximum amount instead of rolling the dice

features.name: Channel Divinity: Sacred Weapon
features.description:
As an action, for 1 minute, I add my Cha modifier to hit for one weapon I'm holding
It also counts as magical and emits bright light in a 20-ft radius and equal dim light

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Unholy
features.description:
As an action, all fiends/undead within 30 ft that can hear me must make a Wis save
If one of them fails this save, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage
Turned: move away, never within 30 ft of me, no reactions or actions other than Dash
Turned: may Dodge instead of Dash when nowhere to move and unable to escape bonds

features.name: Aura of Devotion
features.description: While I'm conscious, allies within range and I can't be charmed

features.name: Purity of Spirit
features.description: I am always under the effect of a Protection from Evil and Good spell

features.name: Holy Nimbus
features.description:
As an action, I shine with a 30-ft radius bright light and equal dim light for 1 minute
If an enemy starts its turn in the bright light, it takes 10 radiant damage
For the duration, I have advantage on saves vs. spells cast by fiends and undead

features.name: Frenzy
features.description:
As a bonus action each turn while raging, I can make a melee attack
After my rage is over, I suffer one level of exhaustion

features.name: Mindless Rage
features.description: While raging, I can't be charmed or frightened, and such effects are suspended

features.name: Intimidating Presence
features.description:
As an action, frighten one creature in 30 ft for one turn if it fails a Wisdom save
This effect ends if the creature is out of line of sight or more than 60 ft away
If a creature succeeds its saving throw, it is immune for 24 hours

features.name: Retaliation
features.description: When an enemy within 5 ft damages me, I can make a melee attack as a reaction

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy evocation spells into my spellbook

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.description:
If I cast an evocation spell affecting others I can see, I can protect 1 + the spell's level
The chosen automatically succeed on their saving throws vs. the spell
They also take no damage if the spell would normally deal half damage on a save

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.description: Any cantrips I cast still deal half damage on a successful save

features.name: Empowered Evocation
features.description: I can add my Int modifier to a single damage roll of any wizard evocation spell I cast

features.name: Overchannel
features.description:
When I cast a 5th-level or lower wizard spell that damages, it can deal max damage
Except the first time I do this after a long rest, I suffer 2d12 necrotic dmg per spell lvl
Every time I do it after that, before a long rest, I take another 1d12 necrotic damage
This necrotic damage surpasses my resistances/immunities; I can't overchannel cantrips

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.description: When I reduce a hostile to 0 HP, I gain Cha mod + warlock level temporary HP (min 1)

features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features.description: When I make an ability check or saving throw, I can add 1d10 after rolling the d20

features.name: Fiendish Resilience
features.description:
After a short or long rest, I can choose one damage type to become resistant to
This lasts until I choose another type; Magical and silver weapons ignore this resistance

features.name: Hurl Through Hell
features.description:
When I hit a creature with an attack, I can instantly transport it through lower planes
It returns at the end of my next turn and takes 10d10 psychic damage if not a fiend

features.name: Fast Hands
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can do one of the following:
 • Make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check
 • Use my thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock
 • Take the Use an Object action

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.description: I climb at my normal speed; I add my Dex modifier to the distance of a running jump

features.name: Supreme Sneak
features.description: I have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks when moving no more than half speed

features.name: Use Magic Device
features.description: I can use magic items even if I don't meet the class, race, and/or level requirements

features.name: Thief's Reflexes
features.description:
Unless surprised, I can take two turns on the first round of any combat
The first turn is at my regular initiative, and the second is at my initiative - 10

features.name: Hand Technique
features.description:
Whenever I hit a creature with a Flurry of Blows attack I can do one of the following:
• Have it make a Dexterity save or be knocked prone
• Have it make a Strength save or be pushed up to 15 ft away from me
• Stop it from taking reactions until the end of my next turn

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.description: As an action, I regain hit points equal to three times my monk level

features.name: Tranquility
features.description: After a long rest, I gain the effect of a Sanctuary spell until a next long rest

species.name: Black dragonborn
species.traits:
Black Dragonborn (+2 Strength, +1 Charisma)
Acid Breath Weapon:
   As an action, I exhale destructive energy in a 5-ft by 30-ft line.
   All in the area must make a Dex saving throw with DC 8 + Con modifier + Prof Bonus.
   It does 2d6 acid damage, half as much damage on a successful save.
   The damage increases to 3d6 at level 6, 4d6 at level 11, and 5d6 at level 16.
   I can't use this feature again until I finish a short rest.

species.name: Blue dragonborn
species.traits:
Blue Dragonborn (+2 Strength, +1 Charisma)
Lightning Breath Weapon:
   As an action, I exhale destructive energy in a 5-ft by 30-ft line.
   All in the area must make a Dex saving throw with DC 8 + Con modifier + Prof Bonus.
   It does 2d6 lightning damage, half as much damage on a successful save.
   The damage increases to 3d6 at level 6, 4d6 at level 11, and 5d6 at level 16.
   I can't use this feature again until I finish a short rest.

species.name: Brass dragonborn
species.traits:
Brass Dragonborn (+2 Strength, +1 Charisma)
Fire Breath Weapon:
   As an action, I exhale destructive energy in a 5-ft by 30-ft line.
   All in the area must make a Dex saving throw with DC 8 + Con modifier + Prof Bonus.
   It does 2d6 fire damage, half as much damage on a successful save.
   The damage increases to 3d6 at level 6, 4d6 at level 11, and 5d6 at level 16.
   I can't use this feature again until I finish a short rest.

species.name: Bronze dragonborn
species.traits:
Bronze Dragonborn (+2 Strength, +1 Charisma)
Lightning Breath Weapon:
   As an action, I exhale destructive energy in a 5-ft by 30-ft line.
   All in the area must make a Dex saving throw with DC 8 + Con modifier + Prof Bonus.
   It does 2d6 lightning damage, half as much damage on a successful save.
   The damage increases to 3d6 at level 6, 4d6 at level 11, and 5d6 at level 16.
   I can't use this feature again until I finish a short rest.

species.name: Copper dragonborn
species.traits:
Copper Dragonborn (+2 Strength, +1 Charisma)
Acid Breath Weapon:
   As an action, I exhale destructive energy in a 5-ft by 30-ft line.
   All in the area must make a Dex saving throw with DC 8 + Con modifier + Prof Bonus.

backgrounds.name: Acolyte
backgrounds.equipmentText:
Prayer book/wheel

Incense, sticks of

Vestments
backgrounds.traitText:
I venerate a distinct hero of my faith, and persistently reference that individual's accomplishments and lessons.
I can find universal ground between the most vehement enemies, sympathizing with them and always moving toward unity.
I see portents in all things. The gods attempt to communicate to us, we just need to pay attention.
Nothing can rattle my positive attitude.
I quote (or misquote) holy scripture and aphorisms in nearly all circumstances.
I am accepting (or unaccepting) of other faiths and honor (or dishonor) the devotion to other deities.
I've enjoyed exquisite food, drink, and aristocracy among my faith's most elite. Rougher lifestyles chafe me.
I've spent so much time in the confines of the temple that I have few functional skills interacting with individuals in the rest of the world.

equipment.description: As a bonus action, I speak the command word to animate this shield for 1 minute, until I use a bonus action to end this effect (returns to my hand), or until I am incapacitated or die (falls to ground). The shield leaps into the air, hovering in my space to protect me as if I were wielding it, leaving my hands free.

equipment.name: Apparatus of Kwalish
equipment.description: A Large 500 lb iron barrel. DC 20 Intelligence (Investigation) check finds a hidden hatch at one end, allowing two Medium creatures inside. Transforms to resemble a giant lobster, which is air-tight (10 hours of breathable air), floats, and can submerge to 900 ft deep. See Notes page for its statistics and operation.

equipment.name: Armor of Invulnerability
equipment.description: I have resistance to nonmagical damage while I wear this plate armor. As an action, I can make myself immune to nonmagical damage for 10 minutes or until I am no longer wearing the armor. Once this special action is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

equipment.name: Armor of Resistance
equipment.description: Select the damage type that this armor gives resistance to using the square button in this line. While I'm wearing this armor and attuned to it, I gain resistance to one type of damage.

equipment.name: Armor of Vulnerability
equipment.description: While wearing this plate armor, I have resistance to one of the following damage types: bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing; although, unfortunately, I have vulnerability to the other two until I am targeted by a Remove Curse spell.

equipment.name: Armor, +1, +2, or +3
equipment.description: I have a bonus to AC while wearing this armor. The bonus is determined by the rarity of the magic item: rare (+1), very rare (+2), or legendary (+3). Select the bonus using the little square button in this magic item line.

equipment.name: Arro w of Slaying
equipment.description: This magic ammunition is meant to hurt a particular race, type, or group of creatures. Its specificity varies. If an associated target is hit by this ammunition, it takes +6d10 piercing damage. It can then make a DC 17 Con save to half this extra damage. After dealing its extra damage, the ammunition becomes nonmagical.

equipment.name: Arrow-Catching Shield
equipment.description: I gain an additional +2 bonus to AC against ranged attacks while I wield this shield. This is not calculated into the AC on the 1st page. In addition, whenever an attacker makes a ranged attack against a target within 5 feet of me, I can use my reaction to become the target of the attack instead.

equipment.name: Bag of Beans
equipment.description: This heavy cloth bag contains 3d4 dry beans. I can dump all on the ground, causing a 10-ft explosion that deals 5d4 fire damage to all in the area, DC 15 Dex save to half, and ignites unattended flammable objects. I can plant and water a bean to get an effect 1 minute later, chosen by the DM, see notes page.

equipment.name: Bag of Devouring
equipment.description: This bag is a feeding orifice for an extradimensional creature, which is closed if it is turned inside out. It devours all edible matter placed inside. Creatures partially inside get pulled in 50% of the time. Escaping (Str DC 15) or pulling another out (Str DC 20) is an action. Creatures starting their turn inside are devoured.

equipment.name: Bag of Holding
equipment.description: This bag is 2 ft in diameter at the mouth, 4 ft deep, and 15 lb regardless of content. It can hold up to 500 lb, not exceeding a volume of 64 cu ft. Retrieving an item from it requires an action. If it's overloaded, pierced, or torn, it's destroyed with its contents in the Astral plane. If turned inside out, all its contents spill forth.

equipment.name: Bag of Tricks
equipment.description: This ordinary bag, made from gray, rust, or tan cloth, appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a small, fuzzy object; which, as an action, I can throw 20 ft, where it transforms into a random creature.

equipment.name: Battleaxe
equipment.description: Versatile (1d10)

equipment.name: Bead of Force
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can throw this sphere 60 ft, creating a 10-ft radius explosion on impact. All creatures within the explosion must make a DC 15 Dex save or take 5d4 force damage and are trapped in a sphere of transparent force that encloses the area for 1 minute. The sphere can be moved from the in- and outside.

equipment.name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
equipment.description: While wearing this belt, my Con increases by 2 (to max 20), I get adv. on Cha (Persuasion) checks to interact with dwarves, adv. on saves vs. poison, resistance to poison damage, darkvision 60 ft, and know Dwarvish. Each day at dawn, there is a 50% chance I grow a full beard or my current beard becomes visibly thicker.

equipment.name: Belt of Giant Strength
equipment.description: Set the type of giant using the button in this line. While wearing this belt, my Strength score changes to a certain number depending on the type of giant the belt is associated with, provided that my Strength is not already that amount or higher.

equipment.name: Berserker Axe
equipment.description: This axe gives +1 to hit and damage, +1 HP per level, and is cursed. I can't part with it and have disadv. using other weapons. Whenever I'm damaged by a hostile, I must make a DC 15 Wis save or go berserk, using my action each round to attack the closest creature with the axe until none remain within 60 ft.

equipment.name: Blowgun
equipment.description: Ammunition, loading

equipment.name: Boots of Elvenkind
equipment.description: While I wear these boots, my steps make no sound, regardless of the surface I am moving across. I also have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks that rely on moving silently.

equipment.name: Boots of Levitation
equipment.description: While I wear these boots, I can cast Levitate on myself at will.

equipment.name: Boots of Speed
equipment.description: As a bonus action, I can click the heels of these boots together to double my walking speed and make opportunity attacks against me have disadvantage. I can end this effect with another bonus action. After the boots' magic has been used for a total of 10 minutes, they lose their power until I finish a long rest.

equipment.name: Boots of Striding and Springing
equipment.description: While I wear these boots, my walking speed becomes 30 feet, unless my walking speed is higher, and my speed isn't reduced if I am encumbered or wearing heavy armor. In addition, I can jump three times the normal distance, though I can't jump farther than my remaining movement would allow.

equipment.name: Boots of the Winterlands
equipment.description: While wearing these boots, I have resistance to cold damage and I ignore difficult terrain created by ice or snow. I can tolerate temperatures as low as -50 °F without any additional protection. If I wear heavy clothes, I can tolerate temperatures as low as -100 °F.

equipment.name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
equipment.description: While this bowl is filled with water, I can speak the bowl's command word as an action and summon a water elemental, as if I had cast Conjure Elemental. The bowl can't be used again until the next dawn. The bowl is about 1 foot in diameter and half as deep, and holds about 3 gallons of water.

equipment.name: Bracers of Archery
equipment.description: While wearing these bracers, I have proficiency with the longbow and shortbow, and I gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls on ranged attacks made with such weapons.

equipment.name: Bracers of Defense
equipment.description: These bracers give me a +2 bonus to AC, but only if I'm not wearing armor or using a shield.

equipment.name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
equipment.description: While a fire burns in this brass brazier, I can use an action to speak the brazier's command word and summon a fire elemental, as if I had cast the Conjure Elemental spell. The brazier can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

equipment.name: Brooch of Shielding
equipment.description: While wearing this brooch, I have resistance to force damage, and have immunity to damage from the Magic Missile spell.

equipment.name: Broom of Flying
equipment.description: With the command word, this broom hovers and can either be ridden in the air or sent alone up to 1 mile by naming a familiar location. It has a flying speed of 50 ft, holds up to 400 lb, but only has 30 ft speed if over 200 lb. It stops hovering when I land. With another command word, it flies to me if within 1 mile.

equipment.name: Candle of Invocation
equipment.description: This slender taper is dedicated to a deity and shares that deity's alignment. Lit, it sheds dim light in a 30-ft radius for up to 4 hours and grants benefits to creatures of matching alignment in the light.

equipment.name: Cape of the Mountebank
equipment.description: While wearing this cape, I can use it to cast the Dimension Door spell as an action. This property of the cape can't be used again until the next dawn. The cape smells faintly of brimstone. When I disappear, smoke lightly obscures the place that I left and the place that I appear, which dissipates at the end of my next turn.

equipment.name: Carpet of Flying
equipment.description: I can speak the carpet's command word as an action to make the carpet hover and fly. It moves according to my spoken directions if I am within 30 feet of it. A carpet can carry up to twice the weight for its type, but it flies at half speed if it carries more than its normal capacity.

equipment.name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
equipment.description: While incense is burning in this censer, I can use an action to speak the censer's command word and summon an air elemental, as if I had cast Conjure Elemental. The censer can't be used this way again until the next dawn. This 6" wide, 1' high vessel resembles a chalice with a decorated lid.

equipment.name: Chill Touch
equipment.description: Target can't regain HP; Undead dis. on attacks vs. me until my next turn

equipment.name: Chime of Opening
equipment.description: I can strike this as an action, pointing it at an object within 120 ft of me that can be opened (i.e. door, lid, lock). One lock or latch on it opens unless the sound can't reach it. If no locks or latches remain, the object itself opens. The chime can be used ten times. After the tenth time it cracks and becomes useless.

equipment.name: Circlet of Blasting
equipment.description: While wearing this circlet, I can use an action to cast the Scorching Ray spell with it. When I make the spell's attacks, I do so with an attack bonus of +5. The circlet can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

equipment.name: Cloak of Arachnida
equipment.description: This cloak grants me resistance to poison damage, climbing speed equal to my walking speed, even along vertical surfaces and upside down while keeping my hands free, freedom from being caught in webs, the ability to move through webs as if just difficult terrain, and the ability to cast Web once per dawn.

equipment.name: Cloak of Displacement
equipment.description: While I wear this cloak, creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against me as I appear to be standing in a slightly different location. If I take damage, this property ceases to function until the start of my next turn. The property is suppressed while I am incapacitated, restrained, or otherwise unable to move.

equipment.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
equipment.description: While I wear this cloak with its hood up, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see me have disadvantage, and I have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide, as the cloak's color shifts to camouflage me. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

equipment.name: Cloak of Protection
equipment.description: While I wear this cloak, I gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

equipment.name: Cloak of the Bat
equipment.description: This cloak grants me adv. on Stealth checks. In dim light or darkness, I can fly with it and, once per dawn, use it to transform myself into a bat as if casting Polymorph. To fly, at 40 ft speed, I have to grip its edges with both my hands. While in the form of the bat, I retain my Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores.

equipment.name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
equipment.description: While wearing this cloak with its hood up, I can breathe underwater, and I have a swimming speed of 60 ft. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

equipment.name: Club
equipment.description: Light

equipment.name: Crystal Ball
equipment.description: I can cast Scrying (DC 17) at will while touching this ball of about 6 inches in diameter.

equipment.name: Cube of Force
equipment.description: Each face of this 1-inch cube has a distinct marking on it. As an action, I can press one of these faces, expending a number of charges to create an effect based on the chosen face, if enough charges remain. This creates a 15-ft cube barrier of force on me for 1 min, which moves with me. See Notes page for details.

equipment.name: Cubic Gate
equipment.description: The six sides of this 3-inch cube, which radiates palpable magic energy, are each keyed to a different plane of existence (one is material plane). As an action, I can expend a charge and press a side of the cube once to cast Gate or twice to cast Plane Shift (DC 17). Both spells only link to the plane on the pressed side.

equipment.name: Daern's Instant Fortress
equipment.description: As an action, I can place this 1-inch metal cube on the ground and speak its command word, making it grow into a 20-ft by 20-ft by 30-ft high adamantine tower with a door facing me, arrow slits on all sides, battlement atop, two floors, and a ladder along one wall ending at a trapdoor to the roof. See Notes page for details.

equipment.name: Dagger
equipment.description: Finesse, light, thrown

equipment.name: Dagger of Venom
equipment.description: This magical dagger adds a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. As an action once per dawn, I can have the blade coat itself with thick, black poison, lasting 1 min. While it is coated, the first creature hit must make a DC 15 Con save or take 2d10 poison damage and become poisoned for 1 min.

equipment.name: Dancing Sword
equipment.description:
As a bonus action, I can toss this sword into the air and use the command to make it hover, fly up to 30 ft and attack a target of my choice (as if I'm using it).
I can command it to move/attack again as a bonus action while it hovers and is in 30 ft.
After the 4th attack, it moves 30 ft to return to my hand.

equipment.name: Dart
equipment.description: Finesse, thrown

equipment.name: Decanter of Endless Water
equipment.description: As an action, I open the flask & speak a command word, pouring fresh/salt water out until my next turn starts. "Stream" for 1 gal. "Fountain" for 5 gal. "Geyser" for 30 gal in 30 ft × 1 ft geyser. As a bonus action, I can aim it at a target, which has to make a DC 13 Str save or take 1d4 bludgeoning damage and fall prone.

equipment.name: Deck of Illusions
equipment.description: As an action, I can draw a card at random from this deck and throw it on the ground within 30 ft. An illusion, determined by the type of card, forms over the thrown card and remains until dispelled. While I'm within 120 ft of it, I can use an action to move it within 30 ft of the card. See Notes page for more details.

equipment.name: Deck of Many Things
equipment.description: Before drawing cards from this deck, I must declare how many I wish to draw and then draw that number randomly. Any cards drawn in excess have no effect. When a card is drawn, its magic takes effect, it fades from existence, and, unless the card is the Fool or the Jester, reappears in the deck. See Notes page.

equipment.name: Defender
equipment.description: I have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. The first time I attack with it on each of my turns, I can transfer (part of) the bonus to AC instead. This adjustment remains in affect until the start of my next turn, although I must be holding the sword to gain its bonus to AC.

equipment.name: Demon Armor
equipment.description: While wearing this plate armor, I have +1 AC, know Abyssal, and can use its clawed gauntlets to make unarmed strikes that deal 1d8 slashing damage with a +1 bonus to hit and damage. I have disadv. on attacks and on saves vs. demons, their spells and abilities. I can't doff it without Remove Curse or similar magic.

equipment.name: Dimensional Shackles
equipment.description: As an action, I can shackle an incapacitated creature of size Small to Large. They work as mundane manacles and prevent extradimensional movement, but not portal travel. I and others I designate can remove them as an action. The bound target can try every 30 days to break them with a DC 30 Athletics check.

equipment.name: Dragon Scale Mail
equipment.description: While wearing this armor, I gain a resistance to a damage type, +1 AC and advantage on saving throws against the frightful presence and breath weapons of dragons. Once per dawn as an action, I can magically discern the distance and direction to the closest dragon of the armor's type within 30 miles of me.

equipment.name: Dragon Slayer
equipment.description: I have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. When I hit a creature with the dragon type with this sword, it does 3d6 extra damage of the weapon's damage type.

equipment.name: Dust of Disappearance
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can throw this dust into the air. By doing so, me and all creatures within 10 ft of me become invisible for 2d4 minutes. The duration is the same for all subjects. If a creature affected by the dust attacks or casts a spell, the invisibility ends for that creature.

equipment.name: Dust of Dryness
equipment.description: As an action, I can sprinkle a pinch of dust over water, turning a 15-ft cube into a floating, marble-sized pellet. As an action, someone can smash the pellet against a hard surface, destroying it and releasing the absorbed water. A pinch of dust does 10d6 necrotic damage to a water elemental, Con save DC 13 halves.

equipment.name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can throw this dust into the air, causing me and all creatures within 30 ft that need to breathe to make a DC 15 Con save or start sneezing uncontrollably and be unable to breathe, thus becoming incapacitated and suffocating. Those affected can repeat their save at the end of each of their turns.

equipment.name: Dwarven Plate
equipment.description: While wearing this plate armor, I gain a +2 bonus to AC. In addition, if an effect moves me against my will along the ground, I can use my reaction to reduce the distance I am moved by up to 10 ft.

equipment.name: Dwarven Thrower
equipment.description: This magical warhammer adds a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. It has the thrown property with a normal range of 20 ft and a long range of 60 ft. It deals an extra 1d8 damage (or 2d8 if the target is a giant) when thrown. Immediately after the attack, the weapon flies back to my hand.

equipment.name: Efreeti Bottle
equipment.description: When I use an action to remove the stopper from this painted brass bottle, a cloud of thick smoke flows out of the bottle. At the end of my turn, an efreeti appears in an unoccupied space within 30 ft of me. The first time the bottle is opened, the DM rolls to determine what happens.

equipment.name: Eldritch Blast
equipment.description: Each d10 is a separate beam requiring separate rolls

equipment.name: Elemental Gem
equipment.description: This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When I use an action to break the gem, an elemental is summoned as if I had cast the Conjure Elemental spell, and the gem's magic is lost. The type of gem determines the elemental summoned by the spell.

equipment.name: Elven Chain
equipment.description: I gain a +1 bonus to AC while I wear this chain shirt. I am considered proficient with this armor even if I lack proficiency with medium armor.

equipment.name: Eversmoking Bottle
equipment.description: When I use an action to remove the stopper, a cloud of thick heavily obscuring smoke flows out of the bottle in a 60-ft radius, increasing by 10 ft for each minute the bottle is open, until it reaches 120 ft. Closing it requires me to speak the command word as an action. Once closed, the cloud disperses after 10 min.

equipment.name: Eyes of Charming
equipment.description: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. They have 3 charges. While wearing them, I can expend 1 charge as an action to cast Charm Person (save DC 13) on a humanoid within 30 ft of me, provided that I and the target can see each other. The lenses regain all expended charges daily at dawn.

equipment.name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
equipment.description: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, I can see much better than normal out to a range of 1 ft. I have advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks that rely on sight while searching an area or studying an object within that range.

equipment.name: Eyes of the Eagle
equipment.description: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, I have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. In conditions of clear visibility, I can make out details of even extremely distant creatures and objects as small as 2 ft across.

equipment.name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
equipment.description: As an action, I can speak the command word and throw one or more statuettes to an unoccupied space within 60 ft where it becomes a specific creature for a certain amount of time. It is friendly, understands my languages, and obeys my commands.

equipment.name: Fire Bolt
equipment.description: Unattended flammable objects ignite

equipment.name: Flame Tongue
equipment.description: As a bonus action, I can speak the command word of this magic sword, causing flames to erupt from it. These flames add +2d6 fire damage and shine bright light in a 40-ft radius and dim light for an additional 40 ft. The flames last until I speak the command word again as a bonus action or sheathe it.

equipment.name: Folding Boat
equipment.description: As an action, I can speak a command word to have this wooden box become a boat, a ship, or to fold back up. The boat holds 4 Medium creatures and has oars, anchor, mast, and a sail. The ship holds 15 Medium creatures and has a deck, five sets of oars, rowing seats, a steering oar, anchor, deck cabin, mast, and a sail.

equipment.name: Frost Brand
equipment.description: This magic sword adds +1d6 cold damage to its damage and grants me resistance to fire. In freezing temperatures, it sheds bright light in a 10-ft radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft. Once per hour when I draw the blade, I can extinguish all nonmagical flames within 30 ft of me.

equipment.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
equipment.description: My Strength score is 19 while I'm wearing these gauntlets, provided that my Strength is not already 19 or higher.

equipment.name: Gem of Brightness
equipment.description: This gem has 50 charges. As an action while holding it, I can speak a command word to cause it to: shed 30-ft bright and 30-ft dim light, fire a 60-ft beam of light at 1 creature (1 charge, DC 15 Con save or blinded 1 minute), or flare with blinding light in a 30-ft cone (5 charges, DC 15 Con save or blinded 1 minute).

equipment.name: Gem of Seeing
equipment.description: This gem has 3 charges. As an action, I can speak its command word and expend 1 charge. For the next 10 minutes, I have truesight out to 120 ft when I peer through the gem. The gem regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

equipment.name: Giant Slayer
equipment.description: I have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When I hit a creature with the giant type with this weapon, it does 2d6 extra damage of the weapon's damage type and the giant has to make a DC 15 Strength save or be knocked prone.

equipment.name: Glaive
equipment.description: Heavy, reach, two-handed

equipment.name: Glamoured Studded Leather
equipment.description: Studded leather with +1 AC. As a bonus action, I can speak its command word and have it assume the appearance of a normal set of clothing or another armor. I decide what it looks like: style, color, and accessories, but the armor retains its bulk and weight. The illusion lasts until I use this again or remove the armor.

equipment.name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
equipment.description: While wearing these gloves, climbing and swimming don't cost me extra movement, and I gain a +5 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks made to climb or swim.

equipment.name: Goggles of Night
equipment.description: While wearing these dark lenses, I have darkvision out to a range of 60 feet. If I already have darkvision. wearing the goggles increases its range by 60 feet.

equipment.name: Greataxe
equipment.description: Heavy, two-handed

equipment.name: Greatclub
equipment.description: Two-handed

equipment.name: Greatsword
equipment.description: Heavy, two-handed

equipment.name: Halberd
equipment.description: Heavy, reach, two-handed

equipment.name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
equipment.description: This magical maul adds a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. It has additional features when I'm attuned to it, which requires me to wear both a belt of giant strength and gauntlets of ogre power.

equipment.name: Hand crossbow
equipment.description: Ammunition, light, loading

equipment.name: Handaxe
equipment.description: Light, thrown

equipment.name: Hat of Disguise
equipment.description: As an action while wearing this hat, I can cast Disguise Self from it at will. The spell ends if the hat is removed.

equipment.name: Headband of Intellect
equipment.description: My Intelligence score is 19 while I'm wearing this headband, provided that my Intelligence is not already 19 or higher.

equipment.name: Heavy crossbow
equipment.description: Ammunition, heavy, loading, two-handed

equipment.name: Helm of Brilliance
equipment.description: This helm is set with diamonds, rubies, fire opals, and opals. Gems pried from the helm turn to dust. When all the gems are removed or destroyed, the helm loses its magic. I can use an action to cast a spell by having a gem crumble to dust. The helm has special properties for each type of gem, see Notes page.

equipment.name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
equipment.description: While wearing this helm, I can cast Comprehend Languages at will.

equipment.name: Helm of Telepathy
equipment.description: While wearing this helm, I can cast Detect Thoughts (DC 13). As a bonus action, I can send a telepathic message to a creature that I'm focusing on with Detect Thoughts, which can reply as a bonus action. Once between each dawn, I can cast Suggestion (DC 13) on a creature I'm focusing on with Detect Thoughts.

equipment.name: Helm of Teleportation
equipment.description: This helm has 3 charges. While wearing it, I can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast Teleport from it. The helm regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

equipment.name: Heward's Handy Haversack
equipment.description: This backpack weighs 5 lb, regardless of its contents. It has two side pouches that hold 20 lb (2 cu ft) each and a central pouch that holds 80 lb (8 cu ft). Retrieving an item from it requires an action. If it's overloaded, pierced, or torn, it and its contents are destroyed. If turned inside out, all its contents spill forth.

equipment.name: Holy Avenger
equipment.description: I have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic sword. It does +2d10 radiant damage against fiends and undead. While holding the drawn sword, I have a 10-ft radius aura (30-ft if level 17 paladin) that grants me and my allies adv. on saves against spells and magical effects.

equipment.name: Holy Water
equipment.description: Only does damage against fiends and undead; Comes in flasks

equipment.name: Horn of Blasting
equipment.description: As an action, I can speak the horn's command word and blow it, creating a 30-ft cone. All in it take 5d6 thunder damage and are deafened for 1 min. Half damage with a DC 15 Con save and not deafened. Glass/crystal creatures/objects have disadv. and take 10d6 damage. There is a 20% chance each use that it explodes.

equipment.name: Horn of Valhalla
equipment.description: As an action once per 7 days, I can blow this horn to summon warrior spirits from Ysgard within 60 ft me. These have the statistics of a berserker and return after 1 hour or when they drop to 0 HP. The number and how they respond depends on the type of material the horn is made of.

equipment.name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
equipment.description: While all four shoes are affixed to the hooves of a creature, they allow it to move normally while floating 4 inches above the floor. The creature leaves no tracks, can cross or stand above liquid or unstable surfaces, ignores difficult terrain, and doesn't suffer exhaustion from moving at normal speed for 12 hours a day.

equipment.name: Horseshoes of Speed
equipment.description: While all four shoes are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar creature, they increase the creature's walking speed by 30 ft.

equipment.name: Immovable Rod
equipment.description: This flat iron rod has a button on one end. I can use an action to press the button, magically fixing the rod in place or making it movable again. Once fixed, it holds up to 8000 lb. More weight causes it to deactivate and fall. A creature can use an action to try and move the rod up to 10 ft with a DC 30 Strength check.

equipment.name: Improvised weapon
equipment.description: Damage die, type, range, etc. are at the DM's discretion

equipment.name: Ioun Stone
equipment.description: As an action, I can make an ioun stone orbit my head at 1d3 ft or retrieve it. Others can catch it as an action with an attack or Acrobatics check (AC/DC 24). It has 10 HP and resistance to all damage. Different stones grant different benefits.

equipment.name: Iron Bands of Bilarro
equipment.description: Once per dawn, as an action, I can speak the command word and make a ranged attack (Dex + Prof). If hit, the target is restrained until I use a bonus action to speak the command word again. Once per 24 hours, the target can make a DC 20 Strength check as an action to free itself and destroy the bands.

equipment.name: Iron Flask
equipment.description: As an action I can speak the flask's command word and target a creature from another plane that I can see within 60 ft. It must make a DC 17 Wis save (adv. if trapped before) or be trapped in the flask. It holds only 1 creature. As an action, I can open it to release the creature, which then obeys my commands for 1 hour.

equipment.name: Javelin
equipment.description: Thrown

equipment.name: Javelin of Lightning
equipment.description: Once per dawn I can speak this javelin's command word and make a ranged weapon attack with it on a target within 120 ft. All between me and the target in a 5-ft wide line take 4d6 lightning damage, DC 13 Dex save halves. If the javelin hits the target, it takes 1d6 piercing and 4d6 lightning damage.

equipment.name: Keoghtom's Ointment
equipment.description: This glass jar, 3 inches in diameter, contains 1d4+1 doses of a thick mixture that smells faintly of aloe. As an action, one dose of the ointment can be swallowed or applied to the skin. The creature that receives it regains 2d8+2 hit points, ceases to be poisoned, and is cured of any disease.

equipment.name: Lance
equipment.description: Reach, disadvantage to attack within 5 ft, two-handed when not mounted

equipment.name: Lantern of Revealing
equipment.description: This lantern burns for 6 hours on 1 pint of oil. It shines bright light in a 30-ft radius and dim light for an additional 30 ft. Invisible objects and creatures are visible in the lantern's bright light. As an action, I can lower the hood, making it only dim light in a 5-ft radius.

equipment.name: Light crossbow
equipment.description: Ammunition, loading, two-handed

equipment.name: Light hammer
equipment.description: Light, thrown

equipment.name: Longbow
equipment.description: Ammunition, heavy, two-handed

equipment.name: Longsword
equipment.description: Versatile (1d10)

equipment.name: Luck Blade
equipment.description: This magic sword has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it, and grants me +1 to all saves. Once per dawn, I can use its luck to reroll one attack, ability check, or save, but I must use the second result. As an action, I can use one of its 1d4-1 charges to cast Wish. Charges can't be regained.

equipment.name: Mace of Disruption
equipment.description: While held, this magic mace sheds bright light in a 20-ft radius and dim light for another 20 ft. It deals +2d6 radiant damage vs. fiends and undead. If it has less than 26 HP after this damage, it must make a DC 15 Wis save or be destroyed. If successfully, it instead becomes frightened of me until the end of my next turn.

equipment.name: Mace of Smiting
equipment.description: This magical mace adds a +1 bonus (+3 vs. constructs) to attack and damage rolls made with it. When I roll a 20 on an attack roll, the target takes an extra 7 bludgeoning damage, or an extra 14 bludgeoning damage if it's a construct. If a construct has less than 26 HP after taking this damage, it is destroyed.

equipment.name: Mace of Terror
equipment.description: As an action, I can use 1 charge of this mace to have all chosen creatures within 30 ft make a DC 15 Wis save or be frightened of me for 1 min, repeating the save at the end of its turns. While frightened, it takes only the Dash action to move away (or action to free itself), no reactions, and can't move within 30 ft of me.

equipment.name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
equipment.description: I have advantage on saving throws against spells while I wear this cloak.

equipment.name: Manual of Bodily Health
equipment.description: This book contains health and diet tips, and its words are charged with magic. If I spend 48 hours within 6 days to study its contents and practicing its guidelines, my Constitution score increases by 2, as does my maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

equipment.name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
equipment.description: This book describes fitness exercises, and its words are charged with magic. If I spend 48 hours over a period of 6 days or fewer studying its contents and practicing its guidelines, my Strength score increases by 2, as does my maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

equipment.name: Manual of Golems
equipment.description: This tome can only be used by a spellcaster with two 5th-level spell slots. Others reading it take 6d6 psychic damage.

equipment.name: Manual of Quickness of Action
equipment.description: This book contains coordination and balance exercises, and its words are charged with magic. If I spend 48 hours within 6 days to study its contents and practicing its guidelines, my Dexterity score increases by 2, as does my maximum for that score. The manual then loses its magic, but regains it in a century.

equipment.name: Maul
equipment.description: Heavy, two-handed

equipment.name: Medallion of Thoughts
equipment.description: The medallion has 3 charges. While wearing it, I can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast Detect Thoughts (save DC 13) from it. The medallion regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

equipment.name: Mirror of Life Trapping
equipment.description: As an action when I'm within 5 ft of this mirror, I can speak its command word and activate it and it remains activated until I do so again. Creatures other than me who look in the activated mirror must make a DC 15 Charisma save or become trapped in one of its twelve extradimensional cells. See Notes page for info.

equipment.name: Mithral Armor
equipment.description: Mithral is a light, flexible metal. If the armor normally imposes disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks or has a Strength requirement, the mithral version of the armor doesn't. A mithral chain shirt or breastplate can be worn under normal clothes.

equipment.name: Necklace of Adaptation
equipment.description: While wearing this necklace, I can breathe normally in any environment, and I have advantage on saving throws made against harmful gases and vapors (such as Cloudkill and Stinking Cloud effects, inhaled poisons, and the breath weapons of some dragons).

equipment.name: Necklace of Fireballs
equipment.description: This necklace has 1d6+3 beads hanging from it. As an action, I can detach a bead and throw it up to 60 ft away where it detonates as a 3rd-level Fireball (save DC 15). I can hurl multiple beads as part of the same action, increasing the level of the Fireball by 1 for each bead beyond the first.

equipment.name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
equipment.description: This necklace has many beads, 1d4+2 are magical and can each be used to cast a spell once per dawn as a bonus action. The DM selects the spells from: Bless, Cure Wounds & Lesser Restoration, Greater Restoration, Branding Smite, Planar Ally, and Wind Walk. Multiple beads of the same type can be on one necklace.

equipment.name: Net
equipment.description: Thrown, only 1 attack, up to large creature hit is restrained

equipment.name: Nine Lives Stealer
equipment.description: I have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this magic sword. It has 1d8+1 charges and if it inflicts a critical hit while it has charges left on a creature with fewer than 100 HP (and that is not a construct or undead), the target must make a DC 15 Con save or die. If it dies, the sword uses a charge.

equipment.name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
equipment.description: This wooden box contains a brush and 1d4 pots of paint. Each pot contains enough paint to cover 1000 sq ft, which can turn into 10000 cu ft of inanimate objects or terrain features. Those become real upon completion of a painting. It takes 10 min to paint 100 sq ft. Nothing created can have a value over 25 gp.

equipment.name: Oathbow
equipment.description: When I attack with this longbow and say its command phrase, I make the target my sworn enemy if I don't have one already for 7 days or until it dies. Attacks with this bow vs. it get adv, +3d6 damage, ignore cover (not full), and suffer no disadv. from long range. While it lives, I have disadv. when I use other weapons.

equipment.name: Oil of Etherealness
equipment.description: This cloudy gray oil can be used once to cover a Medium or smaller creature, along with the equipment it's wearing and carrying (one additional vial is required for each size category above Medium). Applying the oil takes 10 minutes. The affected target then gains the effect of the Etherealness spell for 1 hour.

equipment.name: Oil of Sharpness
equipment.description: This clear, gelatinous oil sparkles with tiny, ultrathin silver shards. It can be used once to coat one slashing or piercing weapon or up to 5 pieces of slashing or piercing ammunition. Applying the oil takes 1 minute. For 1 hour, the coated item is magical and has a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

equipment.name: Oil of Slipperiness
equipment.description: This sticky black unguent can be used once to cover a Medium or smaller creature and its equipment, granting it the effects of  Freedom of Movement for 8 hours. Applying it takes 10 minutes. Alternatively, it can be poured out as an action, duplicating the effects of the Grease spell in a 10-ft square for 8 hours.

equipment.name: Pearl of Power
equipment.description: While this pearl is on my person, I can use an action to speak its command word and regain one expended spell slot. If the expended slot was of 4th level or higher, the new slot is 3rd level. Once I have used the pearl, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

equipment.name: Periapt of Health
equipment.description: I am immune to contracting any disease while I wear this pendant. If I am already infected with a disease, the effects of the disease are suppressed while I wear the pendant.

equipment.name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
equipment.description: This delicate silver chain has a brilliant-cut black gem pendant. While I wear it, poisons have no effect on me. I am immune to the poisoned condition and have immunity to poison damage.

equipment.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
equipment.description: While I wear this pendant, I stabilize whenever I am dying at the start of my turn. In addition, whenever I roll a Hit Die to regain hit points, I double the number of hit points it restores.

equipment.name: Philter of Love
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this rose-hued liquid or administer it to another. The consumer is charmed for 1 hour by the first creature it sees within 10 minutes of drinking it. If that creature is of a species and gender the consumer is normally attracted to, it regards the creature as its true love while it is charmed.

equipment.name: Pike
equipment.description: Heavy, reach, two-handed

equipment.name: Pipes of Haunting
equipment.description: These pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. As an action, I can use 1 charge to play them and have each (or only hostile) creature in 30 ft that can hear them make a DC 15 Wis save or be frightened of me for 1 minute. A target can repeat the save at the end of each of their turns.

equipment.name: Pipes of the Sewers
equipment.description: The pipes have 3 charges, regain 1d3 at dawn, and cause rats to be indifferent toward me unless threatened. As an action, I can play them, then use a bonus action to summon rats in 0.5 miles to form 1 swarm per charge spend. While playing, rat swarms in 30 ft make a Wis check vs. my Cha check or obey my commands.

equipment.name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
equipment.description: As an action while I'm wearing this plate armor, I can speak its command word to cast Etherealness on myself. This effect lasts for 10 minutes or until I remove the armor or use an action to speak the command word again. This property of the armor can't be used again until the next dawn.

equipment.name: Poison Spray
equipment.description: Con save, success - no damage; 1 creature

equipment.name: Portable Hole
equipment.description: As an action, I can unfold this black cloth, 6 ft in diameter, and place it on a solid surface, whereupon it creates a 10-ft deep extradimensional hole. It can't be used to create passages. The space is always the same, so I can store things and creatures in there. Removing it and folding it back takes an action.

equipment.name: Potion of Animal Friendship
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to be able to cast the Animal Friendship spell for 1 hour at will, charming beasts with Int < 4 for 1 hour if it fails a DC 13 Wis save. Agitating this muddy liquid brings little bits into view: a fish scale, a hummingbird tongue, a cat claw, or a squirrel hair.

equipment.name: Potion of Clairvoyance
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain the effect of the Clairvoyance spell. This creates an invisible sensor within 1 mile, in a familiar or obvious location, that the consumer can see or hear through. An eyeball bobs in this yellowish liquid but vanishes when the potion is opened.

equipment.name: Potion of Climbing
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain, for 1 hour, a climbing speed equal to the consumer's walking speed and adv. on Str (Athletics) checks to climb. The potion is separated into brown, silver, and gray layers resembling bands of stone. Shaking it fails to mix the colors.

equipment.name: Potion of Diminution
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to be reduced as per the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no concentration required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously contracts to a tiny bead and then expands to color the clear liquid around it.

equipment.name: Potion of Flying
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain a flying speed equal to the consumer's walking speed for 1 hour and be able to hover. When the potion wears off, the consumer falls. This potion's clear liquid floats at the top of its container and has cloudy white impurities drifting in it.

equipment.name: Potion of Gaseous Form
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain the effect of the Gaseous Form spell for 1 hour (no concentration required), until the consumer drops to 0 HP, or ends the effect as a bonus action. This potion's container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.

equipment.name: Potion of Giant Strength
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to change the consumer's Strength score for 1 hour. The number of this score depends on the type of giant from which a sliver of fingernail is floating in this potions' transparent liquid.

equipment.name: Potion of Growth
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to be enlarged as per the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no concentration required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously expands from a tiny bead to color the clear liquid around it and then contracts.

equipment.name: Potion of Healing
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to heal a number of hit points depending on the type of potion. This potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

equipment.name: Potion of Heroism
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain 10 temporary hit points for 1 hour. For the same duration, the consumer is under the effect of the Bless spell (no concentration required), which adds +1d4 on all attack rolls and saving throws. This blue potion bubbles and steams as if boiling.

equipment.name: Potion of Invisibility
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to become invisible for 1 hour. Anything the consumer wears or carries is invisible along with it. The effect ends early the consumer attacks or casts a spell. This potion's container looks empty but feels as though it holds liquid.

equipment.name: Potion of Mind Reading
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain the effect of the Detect Thoughts spell (save DC 13) for 1 minute. The potion's dense, purple liquid has an ovoid cloud of pink floating in it.

equipment.name: Potion of Poison
equipment.description: The consumer of this potion takes 3d6 poison damage and must make a DC 13 Con save or be poisoned. While poisoned this way, it takes 3d6 poison damage at the start of each of its turns and can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns to lower subsequent damage by 1d6. The poison ends when it reaches 0.

equipment.name: Potion of Resistance
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain resistance to one damage type for 1 hour.

equipment.name: Potion of Speed
equipment.description: Once as an action, I can drink this potion or administer it to another to gain the effects of Haste for 1 minute (no concentration required). The potion's yellow fluid is streaked with black and swirls on its own.

equipment.name: Potion of Water Breathing
